synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-50071 Important: Oracle Linux 8 Unbreakable Enterprise kernel security update
description:

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-50071

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-50071.html
